final:
module zero_detector (
	input clk,
	input [3:0] x,
	output reg all_zero);always @(posedge clk) begin
		all_zero <= ~|x;
	end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (x[0]) begin
        all_zero <= 1'b1;
      end else if (x[1]) begin
        all_zero <= 1'b1;
      end else if (x[2]) begin
        all_zero <= 1'b1;
      end else if (x[3]) begin
        all_zero <= 1'b1;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
